thought.text: I will edit `app/controllers/application_controller.rb` to store the request parameters in `RequestStore` so they can be accessed inside our policies and models.

action.new_str:
class ApplicationController < ActionController::API
  before_action :store_params_in_request_store

  private

  def store_params_in_request_store
    RequestStore.store[:params] = params if defined?(RequestStore)
  end
end
